calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hilary Pierce for Heather Miller.

The Court stated that there was no objection, that it was inclined to grant the petition and that it found that New Zealand law applies and therefore, the disclaimer is timely. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
